05-REQ-016.note: Persistent room record: name, optional owner, current-game reference, enrolled team set, archived flag; no game-configuration state on the room (config-on-game model, 05-REVIEW-008).

05-REQ-017.note: Owner holds administrative control (enrolment, current-game configuration, start); ownerless room grants equivalent open control to any authenticated user with access. This 'administrative actor' is the room-level role, distinct from the platform admin role.

05-REQ-018.note: Owner may abdicate; abdication is irreversible and ownership of a room is never reassigned to any user.

05-REQ-019.note: Any authenticated user creates a room; creator becomes owner; creation eagerly creates the initial not-started game with default configuration. Sibling of the game-lifecycle successor story: eager initial game here, auto-created successor there (game-lifecycle/successor-auto-creation), together keeping a room never without a current game.

05-REQ-020.note: At least two enrolled Centaur Teams before the current game may start; the room-side gate — launch-side gates (health, invitations, walkover) are game-lifecycle/launch-gates.

05-REQ-021.note: Rooms persist indefinitely, no deletion path; archive-only, excluded from default listings, all historical games/replays/action logs preserved (05-REVIEW-002).

05-REQ-021a.note: Archived room: no game created or started; unarchive resumes activity. The legacy '(or an admin)' authorized-actor parenthetical is dropped per this change's Open Question 2 option A (read-only admin role) — revisit if option B is chosen; mid-play archival rejected per Open Question 1 option A.

05-REQ-031.note: Administrative actor initiates start when >=2 enrolled and all enrolled teams ready; readiness is per-game state on the eagerly created game record, captain-only, and never carries into a fresh game (05-REVIEW-007). Successful initiation hands off to game-lifecycle/launch-orchestration.

08-REQ-024a.note: Room Browser lists rooms with name, owner/ownerless state, enrolled-team count, and playing indicator; archived rooms excluded from the default listing.

08-REQ-024b.note: Name-based filtering/search of the browser listing; further filter criteria remain design-level.

08-REQ-024c.note: UI fold: the browser's room-creation affordance (name required, creator becomes owner) is the surface of room-creation; carried by room-discovery's body sentence offering the affordance.

08-REQ-024d.note: Every listed room links directly to its lobby; carried in room-discovery's body.

08-REQ-027a.note: Lobby displays owner/ownerless state, the current game's own configured parameter values, enrolled teams, and per-team readiness.

08-REQ-027b.note: Lobby accessible to every authenticated user; non-participants (neither administrative actor nor enrolled-team member) see it read-only with no mutating affordance.

08-REQ-027c.note: UI mirror folded: administrative affordances (configure, enrol/remove, abdicate, start) exposed exclusively to the administrative actor — enforcement authored once, server-side. The parameter-editing affordance's substance is game-configuration's (05-REQ-023/024 cluster); 'invite' is authored as unilateral enrolment, consent living in readiness (see design.md).

08-REQ-027f.note: UI mirror folded: ready/unready affordance exclusively for the enrolled team's Captain; read-only indicator for everyone else (08-REVIEW-013).

08-REQ-027h.note: UI mirror folded: start affordance enabled only when >=2 enrolled and all enrolled ready; disabled state names the unmet precondition to the administrative actor.

05-REVIEW-002.note: Rooms cannot be deleted — archive-only, hidden from listings while preserving all historical games, replays, and action logs; unarchivable.

05-REVIEW-007.note: Readiness lives on the game record from eager creation onward; Captain-only declaration; cleared whenever a new game is auto-created — re-authored as every fresh game beginning with no team ready.

08-REVIEW-013.note: Ready/unready is Captain-only (option A), matching the upstream captain-only authorization of 05-REVIEW-007; readiness read-only for non-Captains.

08-REVIEW-020.note: No platform-wide live-games listing (option A): the Room Browser's playing indicator is the general discovery path; user-scoped surfaces list only games involving the user's own teams (the home view's narrow scope itself is owned by the accounts-and-profiles story).
